news.title: Oil prices erase gains after Iran says U.S. talks could be pursued based on national interests
news.summary: U.S. forces have started the ninth consecutive night of strikes against Iranian targets. American forces have been striking Iranian targets for the past nine days.

news.title: AMD launches Helios, its first rack AI system to rival Nvidia, adding Microsoft as newest buyer
news.summary: AMD is taking aim at Nvidia with Helios, its first AI rack system. It has landed Microsoft as a new customer, joining Meta, OpenAI and Oracle.

news.title: JetBlue wins Spirit slots at LaGuardia Airport, eyes move to Marine Air Terminal as airlines fight for space
news.summary: JetBlue Airways won takeoff and landing slots for up to 12 roundtrip flights at LaGuardia Airport. JetBlue will fly from New York to New Jersey on a daily basis.

news.title: FIFA emerges as the $9 billion winner as the biggest, brashest World Cup ever draws to a close
news.summary: The World Cup is poised to net over $9 billion in revenue for 2026. The tournament is the most lucrative sporting event in history.

news.title: Two injured after man with airsoft rifles lit fireworks outside NYC immigration court: MS NOW
news.summary: The FBI says an individual set off "an incendiary device" outside 26 Federal Plaza. The FBI says the area contains a U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement office.

news.title: We have $8 million in traditional IRAs. Should we tap them to buy a house — and take the tax hit?
news.summary: “We would rather pay taxes upfront than pay mortgage interest,” he says. “We’d rather pay tax upfront than paying mortgage interest.”

news.title: South Korean stocks weren’t a big deal in your emerging-markets fund. Artificial intelligence changed that.
news.summary: Is your emerging-markets fund an accidental bet on AI? Returns for these two ETFs show why it might be. The two funds are the iShares MSCI Emerging Markets Index and the iSci Investments Emerging Markets Fund.

news.title: SpaceX gave investors intense FOMO. Now the decade’s hottest IPO represents a brutal reality check.
news.summary: The hidden danger of chasing hyped initial public offerings? Skipping the fine print. The SEC is cracking down on companies that don't read their IPO prospectus.

news.title: Can the ‘Magnificent Seven’ save a stock market that might be doomed without them?
news.summary: Apple, Amazon, Nvidia and peers are quietly coming back to life, and that could easily jolt this sleepy stock market back into gear.

news.title: Global oil prices reverse to below $87 a barrel after report of new Iran cease-fire proposal
news.summary: Report of 10-day cease-fire between the U.S. and Iran sparked a sharp decline in energy prices. Oil prices took a dive into the red on Monday morning, reversing an earlier sharp rally.
